creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Build of net-snmp breaks as follows.

[deischen@vega /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp]$ sudo make

Please report the problem to pgollucci@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach
the "/opt/FreeBSD/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.4.2.1/config.log"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be
a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system
(e.g. an `ls /var/db/pkg`).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /opt/FreeBSD/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp; make
